# Laser Profilometer

**Summary**: A tool used to measure surface roughness and profile geometry.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alabdrabalnabi|ALABDRABALNABI, 2023]] used a laser profilometer to evaluate the fracture surface roughness pre- and post-treatment.

## Key Results and Findings

- HCl produced the greatest change in surface roughness, while GLDA and EDTA showed comparable results. ([[2023-alabdrabalnabi|ALABDRABALNABI, 2023, p. 45]])
